overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character moves from a grand classical temple through torch-lit streets and plazas, passing NPCs and architectural landmarks, before entering a secluded courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple entrance with colonnade and geometric pavement

events.description: character raises right arm in a gesture toward the temple door

agents.ego_description: standing before the temple entrance, then raising arm in a gesture while camera circles slightly

entered.detail: large stone building with triangular pediment and tall entrance columns
tall fluted stone columns framing the entrance doorway
massive wooden double doors with metal studs
large black ornate planters containing palm trees flanking the stairs
wall-mounted burning torches illuminating the doorway
geometric stone tile pattern in front of the temple

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a grand classical temple at night, with the player character standing before the entrance. The camera slowly approaches as the character gestures toward the large wooden doors flanked by burning torches and potted palm trees. The geometric stone pavement and tall columns dominate the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: public plaza with fire pits and stone seating

events.description: camera turns left and moves away from temple into open plaza area
mounted NPC on horse passes by in the background

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past NPCs sitting on benches around burning fire pits

notable_agents.action: sitting on stone bench beside a burning fire pit
riding horse along the street in the background

entered.detail: large metal bowls containing burning fires providing light
long stone seating arranged around the fire pits
tall ornate poles with spiral patterns lining the plaza
classical buildings with columns surrounding the open area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the temple to reveal a public plaza where NPCs sit on stone benches around burning fire pits. The character walks past the seated figures as a horse rider passes in the background. Decorative poles and classical buildings frame the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonnaded street with residential buildings and construction

events.description: passing by building with long columned portico on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing pedestrians and a mounted NPC

notable_agents.action: walking along the street wearing a white tunic
riding horse away from the camera down the street

entered.detail: long building with continuous row of columns supporting a roof
mature trees with full canopies lining the street
wooden scaffolding structure against a wall indicating building work
tall white stone walls enclosing properties

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a colonnaded street lined with trees and stone walls. A building with a long portico of columns dominates the right side while construction scaffolding appears ahead. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions and a horse rider moves away down the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with torch lighting

events.description: turns into narrow alleyway between high walls leaving the main street
lighting becomes darker and more dominated by wall-mounted torches

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway toward a doorway at the end

entered.detail: tall white plastered walls with red painted lower sections
burning torches mounted on the alley walls providing warm light
open wooden door frame leading to an interior space

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow alleyway between high walls, leaving the open street behind. The space becomes enclosed with torchlight providing the primary illumination. The character approaches a wooden doorway at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: private courtyard with benches and red awnings

events.description: passes through doorway into enclosed courtyard with trees and seating

agents.ego_description: entering the courtyard and moving toward the central garden area

entered.detail: two-story residential building with lit windows facing the courtyard
stone benches arranged along the courtyard paths
red fabric canopies extending from the building walls
mature trees providing shade in the courtyard center
white decorative lattice fence lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Passing through the doorway, the scene opens into a private courtyard with stone benches, decorative lattice railings, and red fabric awnings. Trees provide cover overhead while the character moves toward the central building. The space is quiet and enclosed, contrasting with the public streets outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the imposing entrance of a grand temple into the social atmosphere of a bustling public plaza at night. It begins with a slow approach toward large wooden doors flanked by burning torches and potted palm trees, where geometric stone pavement and towering columns dominate the view. As the character gestures toward the temple entrance, the camera turns away to reveal an expansive open space framed by classical buildings and decorative poles. The scene then shifts toward the heart of the plaza, gliding past NPCs resting on stone benches around glowing fire pits while a horse rider crosses in the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling public thoroughfare into the secluded intimacy of a private residence. It begins along a wide, colonnaded street lined with trees and stone walls, where pedestrians and a horse rider move past a grand portico and distant construction scaffolding. As the character leaves the open road, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed alleyway where the bright city light is replaced by the flickering glow of torches against high walls. The camera then follows the character through a wooden doorway, causing the space to expand into a quiet courtyard adorned with stone benches, lattice railings, and red fabric awnings. Finally, the movement glides under the cover of overhead trees toward a central building, completing the transition from the noise of the city to a silent, sheltered sanctuary.
